name: Leigh Whannell
question: What was Leigh Whannell's role in the creation of the Saw films?
gold_answer: Leigh Whannell wrote the first Saw film, co-wrote the second and third installments, and was a producer or executive producer for all the films.

name: Leigh Whannell
question: In which Saw films did Leigh Whannell appear as the character Adam?
gold_answer: Leigh Whannell appeared as the character Adam in three installments of the Saw series.

name: Leigh Whannell
question: What year did Leigh Whannell make his directorial debut, and with which film?
gold_answer: Leigh Whannell made his directorial debut in 2015 with the film Insidious: Chapter 3.

name: Leigh Whannell
question: What are some of the notable films Leigh Whannell wrote that were directed by James Wan?
gold_answer: Notable films written by Leigh Whannell and directed by James Wan include Saw (2004), Dead Silence (2007), Insidious (2010), and Insidious: Chapter 2 (2013).

name: Leigh Whannell
question: What other films has Leigh Whannell directed after his debut?
gold_answer: After his directorial debut, Leigh Whannell directed Upgrade (2018) and The Invisible Man (2020).

name: Leigh Whannell
question: What role did Leigh Whannell have in the Saw video game released in 2009?
gold_answer: Leigh Whannell was the writer of the Saw video game released in 2009.
